name: MLP: Transformation is Magic
description:
(CW: Transformation, Mental change)

Thanks to a strange mirror discovered in your attic, you'll quickly find yourself transformed- in body and mind- into an inhabitant of Equestria! You might be a pony, a griffon, a dragon, or something else entirely. It's up to you to decide!

Note: To decide who you transform into, simply tell the bot who you see in your reflection. The bot should take care of the rest.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
